title: Essence Classic
description: A backport of the Essence modpack for 1.12.2. This modpack aims to improve the vanilla Minecraft experience while adding QOL mods such as a minimap, many performance enhancing mods, FarPlaneTwo, and more.
body:
### Essence is a light Minecraft fabric modpack that combines several simple mods such as utility, QOL, and optimization mods to enhance the vanilla game's experience.


## Mod list (v0.1.0):
- 3dSkinLayers - 1.2.0
- AppleSkin - 1.0.14
- Better Biome Blend - 1.1.7
- BetterFps - 1.4.8
- Clumps - 3.1.2
- CraftPresence - 1.9.6
- Dynamic Lights
- [FarPlaneTwo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farplanetwo) - 0.0.1.612
- FoamFix - 0.10.15
- ForgeRocks - 7.3.1
- It's the little things - 1.0.4
- Just Enough Items - 4.16.1.302
- Optifine Capes - 1.0
- Particle Culling - 1.3.1
- Surge - 2.0.79
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap) - 22.16.2
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) - 1.28.3
